studyName: 99 Cases of Small Cell Lung Cancer Study

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where samples were obtained, analyte type, tumor status of samples, histological type of samples, primary, metastasis, of transformed cell line, primary tumor location, tumor stage of sample, tumor grade of sample, type of tumor treatment of participants with small cell lung cancer and involved in the "99 Cases of Small Cell Lung Cancer Study" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_RECURRENT_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: TUMOR_TREATMENT
variables.description: Type of tumor treatment for sample

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, and affection status of participants with small cell lung cancer and involved in the "99 Cases of Small Cell Lung Cancer Study" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Affection status for small cell lung cancer

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, and sample use variable of participants with small cell lung cancer and involved in the "99 Cases of Small Cell Lung Cancer Study" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample use. Seq_DNA_SNP: SNP genotypes derived from sequence data; Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing
